article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.12. Attachment 2 - Council Report dated September 25, 2023 (Telephony) 2026-04-14 .pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on two-year Rogers cellular contract extension worth $1.1 million
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on extending its cellular phone and data services contract with Rogers Communications for two more years, at an estimated cost of $1,135,949 (including taxes), covering staff mobile phones, iPads, and Wi-Fi hotspots.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the council decision if you supply telecom or mobile services to the City of Burnaby.
